title: DogDog
description: Overhauls Minecraft wolves with unique personalities, treasure-hunting abilities, and epic life-saving mechanics!
body:
# DogDog: Personalities, Treasures, and True CompanionshipDog 

Completely overhauls the vanilla Wolf AI, transforming them into irreplaceable companions with deep affinity systems, critical survival mechanics, and distinct personalities that fundamentally change gameplay.

General Mechanics
Affinity & Soul Bond: Interact with your dog empty-handed to build Affinity. Reach 100 Affinity to unlock the "Soul Bond", enabling powerful personality-specific abilities.

Tactical Command: Sneak + Right-Click with an empty hand to toggle between Home Patrol (32-block radius) and Follow modes.

Critical State & Sacrifice: Dogs no longer die instantly. Upon taking fatal damage, they enter a 60-second "Critical State". Use a Golden Apple to save them, or they will turn into a permanent Stone Statue memorial.

Featured Personalities
Craft a Golden Bone to reroll your dog's personality and unlock unique behaviors:

The Coward (Brave Heart): Normally flees from monsters. However, at max Affinity, it will override its fear to teleport and block a fatal blow for you, granting a Totem effect at the cost of its own health and a 5-minute cooldown.![brave heart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86f31afef99ff7c33252c392bfac0fcfad071181.png)

The Treasure Hunter: Throw a Golden Bone to trigger a heist. The dog enters a portal to raid structures (Villages, Mansions, Nether, etc.) for high-tier loot. Success brings treasures; failure brings a squad of angry pursuers.![treasure dog](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d4071eeca1a3968c92f8213fd1e401929b22f80.png)

## 宝藏神犬 (DogDog)：多重性格与真正的羁绊
DogDog 彻底重构了原版狼的底层 AI，将其转化为不可替代的伙伴。通过深度的亲密度养成、濒死抢救机制以及独立的性格系统，为玩家带来全新的宠物交互体验。
基础机制
亲密度与灵魂羁绊： 空手抚摸或喂食可提升亲密度。达到 100 点将触发“灵魂羁绊”，这是解锁性格终极技能的唯一钥匙。

战术指令： 保持空手状态，按住 Shift 右键可切换居家巡逻（32格半径）或跟随模式。

濒死与纪念： 狗狗受致命伤后会进入 60 秒濒死倒计时。及时使用金苹果可救活，否则它将化作永恒的石化雕像。

核心性格
使用黄金骨头即可重置狗狗性格，每种性格拥有独特的 AI 逻辑：

胆小鬼 (勇敢的心)： 平时会躲避怪物，但在亲密度满级时，它会瞬间传送到你面前替你挡下致死伤害。触发后进入 5 分钟冷却。

寻宝专家： 丢出黄金骨头可启动潜入寻宝。狗狗会穿过传送门搜刮各类遗迹（村庄、府邸、地狱等）并带回极品奖励。若潜行失败，则会引来敌对守卫的追击。

### PS
Project Status: Active Development
Implemented Personalities: Coward (Brave Heart), Treasure Hunter, Angel, Shura.
Note: More hidden mechanics and personalities are currently under development. 
项目状态： 持续更新中
已实装性格： 胆小 (Coward)、寻宝 (Treasure)、天使 (Angel)、修罗 (Shura)
备注： 更多隐藏性格与互动机制正在紧锣密鼓地开发。发。发。发。发。发。
